description: A memorial card. The background is a dark photo of deep-red roses lying beside a furled American flag on a dark surface. Inset at the upper left is a framed portrait photograph of a mustached man in a dark suit, light shirt, and patterned red-and-white tie, holding a wooden plaque. Across the lower portion is white serif text reading 'Wall of Honor' (large) beside an ICE/HSI special-agent badge ringed with a blue band; to the right: 'Special Agent Thomas M. Wischerth', then a gold-ruled divider and the phrase 'End of Watch', with the date 'Sunday, March 26, 2017' below. The palette is dark, with roses and flag imagery, serif typography, and the agency badge.
notable_text: Wall of Honor; Special Agent Thomas M. Wischerth; End of Watch; Sunday, March 26, 2017
